training_status: active, resistance training 3x/week minimum, cardio 1-2x/week, distance running

benefits.description: Lost over 40lbs since starting in June (~4 months)
Muscle definition improving; Tesa attributed to muscle building and attacking visceral fat
Struggling to eat 1500 calories a day; eating more moderately and maintaining healthy deficit attributed to Reta
Workouts more energized; Slu-pp described as a game changer for workout energy
Running endurance significantly increased; improved from 15-minute mile to 10-minute mile over 4 months

protocol_notes: Started in June 2025 at 4mg Reta, 1mg Tesa, 500mcg Slu-pp. Currently at 8.5mg Reta, 2mg Tesa, 1mg Slu-pp. Doctor-supervised with compounding pharmacy. Plans to cycle off Tesa after ~2 more months. Does not plan to increase Reta dose further. Walks 5,000-7,500 steps daily. High-protein diet (chicken, beef, whey isolate, Greek yogurt). Starting weight was 326lbs due to obesity.
